note_en: Predictions are my (Opus 4.8) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. Scratch a panel to reveal my call; champion, best-player, scoreline and group-standings predictions refresh as the tournament unfolds.
note_zh: 预测为我（Opus 4.8）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。刮开面板即可揭晓我的判断；夺冠、最佳球员、比分与小组排名预测会随赛事进程更新。

champions.reason_en: Sole favourite after a sharp 3–1 over Senegal; elite spine + Mbappé ceiling.
champions.reason_zh: 3–1 完胜塞内加尔后成为唯一大热；中轴线顶级，姆巴佩上限极高。

champions.reason_en: Best football on paper, but a shock opening draw vs Cape Verde dents the aura.
champions.reason_zh: 纸面打法最强，但首战意外被佛得角逼平，气场受挫。

champions.reason_en: Emphatic 4-2 over Croatia (Kane brace); deepest squad — the question is nerve.
champions.reason_zh: 4-2 大胜克罗地亚（凯恩梅开二度）；阵容厚度最佳，问题在心态。

champions.reason_en: Top non-European; attack can win any game, defence is the swing factor.
champions.reason_zh: 非欧最强；锋线能赢下任何比赛，后防是胜负手。

champions.reason_en: Holders' core intact, opened 3–0; tournament know-how is real edge.
champions.reason_zh: 卫冕核心仍在，首战 3–0；大赛经验是实打实的优势。

champions.reason_en: Held 1–1 by DR Congo — loaded but wasteful; finishing is the swing.
champions.reason_zh: 被刚果（金）逼平 1–1——星光足但浪费机会；终结力是关键。

champions.reason_en: Rebuilt and dangerous, but the back line can be exposed by pace.
champions.reason_zh: 重建后颇具威胁，但后防易被速度打穿。

champions.reason_en: Balanced and well-coached; lacks a single match-winner up top.
champions.reason_zh: 均衡且调教有方；锋线缺一个能单点改变比赛的人。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: Penalties + pace + a France side built to feed him; the safe favourite.
players.reason_zh: 点球+速度+全队为他输送，金靴最稳的热门。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain's creator-finisher; unmatched chance volume if they click.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙的创造兼终结点；若球队转起来，机会量无人能及。

players.name: Harry Kane
players.reason_en: Brace in the 4-2 over Croatia; pure penalty-box efficiency + set-piece threat.
players.reason_zh: 4-2 胜克罗地亚梅开二度；禁区效率+定位球威胁。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: Bagged in a 4–1 over Iraq; most ruthless finisher alive.
players.reason_zh: 4–1 胜伊拉克中破门；当世最冷血的终结者。

players.name: Vinícius Júnior
players.reason_en: Game-breaker on the left; output swings with Brazil's structure.
players.reason_zh: 左路的撕裂者；产量随巴西体系起伏。

players.name: Julián Álvarez
players.reason_en: Relentless movement + a team that wins knockout games.
players.reason_zh: 不知疲倦的跑动+一支擅打淘汰赛的球队。

fixtures.reason_en: Japan's press and quality edge a stubborn Tunisia.
fixtures.reason_zh: 日本的逼抢与质量险胜顽强的突尼斯。

fixtures.reason_en: Spain dominate the ball and finally convert after the Cape Verde scare.
fixtures.reason_zh: 西班牙掌控球权，在被佛得角逼平后终于兑现机会。

fixtures.reason_en: Belgium's talent breaks down a disciplined Iran block.
fixtures.reason_zh: 比利时的天赋撕开纪律严明的伊朗防线。

fixtures.reason_en: Uruguay's experience too much for the debutants.
fixtures.reason_zh: 乌拉圭的经验让初登世界杯的佛得角难以招架。

fixtures.reason_en: Salah-led Egypt edge a battling New Zealand.
fixtures.reason_zh: 萨拉赫领衔的埃及险胜拼劲十足的新西兰。

fixtures.reason_en: Holders' class; Austria contain for a while but fall short.
fixtures.reason_zh: 卫冕冠军底蕴更足；奥地利能顶一阵但终究不敌。
法国的火力碾压伊拉克。

fixtures.reason_en: Haaland decisive in a physical, high-stakes contest for second.
fixtures.reason_zh: 争夺次名的硬仗中，哈兰德成为决定性因素。

fixtures.reason_en: Algeria's individual quality edges a resolute Jordan.
fixtures.reason_zh: 阿尔及利亚的个人能力险胜坚韧的约旦。

fixtures.reason_en: Portugal control; Uzbekistan dig in but concede after the DRC draw.
fixtures.reason_zh: 葡萄牙掌控比赛；在平刚果后，乌兹别克斯坦死守仍丢球。

fixtures.reason_en: England's depth and Kane's form (brace vs Croatia) see off Ghana.
fixtures.reason_zh: 英格兰的厚度与凯恩的状态（对克罗地亚梅开二度）击退加纳。

fixtures.reason_en: Croatia's midfield class responds after the 2-4 loss to England.
fixtures.reason_zh: 0-2 后落后于英格兰，克罗地亚中场的功底做出回应。

fixtures.reason_en: Colombia's form (3-1 over Uzbekistan) continues in an open game.
fixtures.reason_zh: 哥伦比亚状态正佳（3-1 胜乌兹别克斯坦），在对攻中延续。

fixtures.reason_en: Opponents undecided — locks once the bracket is set.
fixtures.reason_zh: 对手未定——对阵确定后再开放竞猜。

groups.reason_en: Mexico have clinched top spot (2-0 RSA, 1-0 KOR); Korea favoured for second.
groups.reason_zh: 墨西哥已锁定头名（2-0 南非、1-0 韩国）；韩国被看好拿次名。

groups.reason_en: Switzerland (4-1 BIH) and host Canada (6-0 QAT) are surging; both close to advancing.
groups.reason_zh: 瑞士（4-1 波黑）与东道主加拿大（6-0 卡塔尔）势头正猛，双双接近出线。

groups.reason_en: Brazil top; Morocco's 2022 core takes second.
groups.reason_zh: 巴西头名；摩洛哥 2022 班底次名。

groups.reason_en: Host USA + Turkey's flair advance; group is tight.
groups.reason_zh: 东道主美国与土耳其的灵气出线；小组胶着。

groups.reason_en: Germany first; Ecuador's defence pips Ivory Coast.
groups.reason_zh: 德国头名；厄瓜多尔的防守险胜科特迪瓦。

groups.reason_en: Oranje top; Japan's press takes a deserved second.
groups.reason_zh: 荷兰居首；日本的逼抢拿下次名。

groups.reason_en: Belgium's talent leads; Salah-led Egypt second.
groups.reason_zh: 比利时天赋领跑；萨拉赫的埃及次名。

groups.reason_en: Spain top despite the Cape Verde scare; Uruguay second.
groups.reason_zh: 西班牙虽被佛得角惊到仍居首；乌拉圭次名。

groups.reason_en: France won 3–1; Haaland's Norway (4–1) grabs second.
groups.reason_zh: 法国 3–1 取胜；哈兰德的挪威（4–1）拿下次名。
阿根廷 3–0；奥地利 3–1 升至次名。

groups.reason_en: Portugal top despite the DRC draw; Colombia (3-1 UZB) second.
groups.reason_zh: 葡萄牙虽平刚果仍居首；哥伦比亚（3-1 乌兹）次名。

groups.reason_en: England top after a 4-2 win over Croatia; second is open between Ghana and Croatia.
groups.reason_zh: 英格兰 4-2 胜克罗地亚后居首；次名在加纳与克罗地亚间未定。
